text.value:
@concat(
'INSERT INTO [dbo].[audit_file_run] VALUES (''',
pipeline().RunId, ''',''',
pipeline().PipelineName, ''',''',
activity('Check_File').output.childItems[0].name, ''',''',
utcNow(), ''',',
'NULL, ''',
pipeline().DataFactory, ''',''',
'In Progress'',''Ingestion'',''',
variables('v_date'), ''',''',
'YET TO START'',',
'NULL, NULL)'
)

activities.name: update_AuditFile_Success
activities.description: Script to update to Audit File

text.value:
@concat(
    'UPDATE [dbo].[audit_file_run] SET PipelineStatus = ''Completed'',
     silver_gold_id_status = ''In Progress'',
     EndTimeUTC = SYSDATETIME()
     WHERE PipelineRunId = ''',
    pipeline().RunId,
    ''''
)

@concat(
    'UPDATE [dbo].[audit_file_run] SET PipelineStatus = ''Failed'',
     silver_gold_id_status = ''Failed'',
     EndTimeUTC = SYSDATETIME()
     WHERE PipelineRunId = ''',
    pipeline().RunId,
    ''''
)

activities.name: script_update_auditFile
activities.description: Script to update Audit Run File SS complete

text.value:
@concat(
    'UPDATE [dbo].[audit_file_run] SET silver_gold_id_status = ''Completed'',
     EndTimeUTC = SYSDATETIME()
     WHERE PipelineRunId = ''',
    pipeline().RunId,
    ''''
)
